artifacts.description: Machine-readable digital twin bottleneck scenario model with calculations, risk flags, ranking, and validation checks.
Human-readable memo with intermediate calculations, sensitivity notes, validation checks, and a final decision table.

checks: effective_capacity formula applied to all stations
lowest effective capacity identified as bottleneck
buffer_AB flagged because A exceeds B by 43.36%, above the 15% threshold
buffer_BC not flagged because B does not exceed C
final memo and model are internally consistent
